summary: Completed testing of 3 new features: Giving Goals/Pledges, Custom Fields UI Builder, and Registration Add-ons Enhancement. All backend APIs (31 tests) pass 100%. All frontend components verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed route ordering bug in admin_settings.py - /reorder endpoint was being matched as /{field_id} due to route definition order. Moved /reorder route before /{field_id} routes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features fully tested and working: 1) Giving Goals - portal members can set/edit/delete annual giving goals with progress tracking, 2) Custom Fields Builder - admins can create/edit/delete/reorder custom field definitions (text/select/multiselect/boolean/date/number/textarea), 3) Registration Add-ons - enhanced with description, required checkbox, and max_qty fields. All APIs return correct status codes and data. Frontend components render correctly with proper data-testid attributes.

endpoints: GET /api/portal/giving-goal - Returns goal with progress (ytd_given, progress_pct, remaining)
giving_goals.frontend: GivingGoalTracker component on Portal Give page shows progress bar, edit/delete buttons, goal amount

custom_fields.frontend: CustomFieldsBuilder in Settings > Custom Fields tab, PersonCustomFields in PersonDetail Overview tab

endpoints: GET /api/admin/registrations/configs/{event_id} - Get config with enhanced add-ons
registration_addons.frontend: Registration config dialog shows add-on builder with description textarea, required checkbox, max_qty input

bug_fixed.root_cause: Route ordering - /reorder was defined after /{field_id} so 'reorder' was being matched as a field_id
bug_fixed.fix: Moved /reorder route definition before /{field_id} routes in admin_settings.py
